description:
Download audio from YouTube, SoundCloud or Bandcamp.

You like to listen to music on YouTube, SoundCloud or Bandcamp and want to save it for offline playing. Or you want to download the soundtrack of a new movie. Then we recommend you to try out this software developed specifically for this purpose.
- fixed extra unrelated videos being added from YouTube playlists
- fixed download of large YouTube playlists (some stopped at 100 videos)
- fixed download of Twitter/X GIFs
- fixed 256 kbps audio for YouTube Music Premium
- improved YouTube parsing speed for videos with many audio tracks
- lots of improvements for YouTube
- fixed download from VK (stays logged in, user and group pages)
- fixed download from Twitch
- fixed password-protected videos from Vimeo
- fixed single-track downloads from Bandcamp
- fixed download from SoundCloud
- fixed audio quality for Bilibili (FLAC)
- thumbnails are now saved in their original format
- [win] fixed startup on systems with missing graphics libraries
- fixed several crashes and improved download history reliability
- minor improvements for stability
